# RenovaIQ

> Free bathroom remodel cost calculator and renovation cost guide for US homeowners, built on real contractor pricing data.

RenovaIQ helps US homeowners estimate bathroom remodeling costs before hiring a contractor or buying materials. Unlike generic calculators, RenovaIQ breaks down labor, materials, and hidden costs (permits, contingency buffer, pre-1980 home alerts, debris removal, mold remediation) that are often overlooked. Pricing logic is informed by real-world data from Sanabria Barrios Flooring Inc., a Florida-registered remodeling contractor (Sunbiz Reg. No. P16000023654, D-U-N-S 03-550-0949) active since 2016.

## Tools

- [Bathroom Remodel Cost Calculator](https://renovaiqapp.com/calculadora): Free, no-signup tool to estimate bathroom remodel costs by type (Master Bathroom, Guest Bathroom, Shower Remodel), with labor, materials, and hidden cost breakdown.

## Guides

- [Bathroom Remodel Cost Guide (USA)](https://renovaiqapp.com/blog/bathroom-remodel-cost-usa): Average bathroom remodel costs across the US, hidden cost breakdown, comparison of where to buy materials (Lowe's, Floor & Decor, Amazon, Wayfair, and others), and independent contractor vs. company considerations.

## About

RenovaIQ is free for homeowners. The platform is supported through contractor partnerships and retailer affiliate relationships disclosed on the site.
